start_date.title: Select start date
start_date.description: The tour runs from the date you choose.

travellers.title: Travellers
travellers.description: How many people will be joining the tour?

options.title: Choose option
options.description: You can change this selection — it affects the final price.

step_2.title: Traveller information
step_2.description: Please provide details for each traveller as they appear on their passport.

file.label: File
file.formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS less than 50MB

step_3.success_desc: Your request has been sent to the provider. We've emailed a copy to

request_submitted.title: Request submitted
request_submitted.desc: Just now · We've received your booking details.

provider_review.title: Provider review
provider_review.desc: The provider will respond within 24 hours. You'll get an email when there's news.

booking_confirmed.title: Booking confirmed
booking_confirmed.desc: Once approved, you'll receive payment instructions.

payment_info.title: Payment info
payment_info.desc: Pay and receive your final itinerary and travel documents.

voucher_time.title: Voucher time
voucher_time.desc: We send to you voucher with your itinerary and document.
